head.hi: The Spanish Chargé to the Secretary of State.

div.p: Mr. Secretary: I have the honor to inform your excellency that I am advised by cablegram from my Government that the copy of the circular relative to the indemnities on account of the Casablanca incident intended for the Federal Government was mailed from Madrid on the 16th instant.

I shall lose no time in handing the document to your excellency as soon as it reaches me, and in the meantime I beg to say that it is substantially the same as the circular of the Paris cabinet on the same subject, a summary of which I understand was delivered to Mr. Bacon day before yesterday by the French ambassador.
